# 1.2 Legislative DOs

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

## Classes to Migrate and Expand

| Existing Class | Migration Notes |
|---------------|-----------------|
| `LegislativeBillDO` | Rename to `BillDO`. Expand fields to match full `bills` table schema. |
| `BillTextLinksDO` | Migrate as-is for text version storage. |
| `LegislativeBillDTO.toDO` | Update to produce expanded `BillDO`. |

**`BillDO` expanded fields** (all columns from `bills` table):
billId (PK), congress, billType, number, title, originChamber, originChamberCode, introducedDate, policyArea, latestActionDate, latestActionText, constitutionalAuthorityText, sponsorBioguideId, textUrl, textFormat, textVersionType, textDate, textContent, textEmbedding (vector), summaryText, summaryActionDesc, summaryActionDate, updateDate, updateDateIncludingText, legislationUrl, apiUrl, createdAt, updatedAt

**Bill text lifecycle:** Metadata arrives before text. `textUrl`, `textFormat`, `textVersionType`, `textDate`, `textContent`, `textEmbedding` are `Option` fields. Text versions are immutable; new legislative stages publish new versions. `updateDateIncludingText` changes on new text version; bills-pipeline (Component 4) uses it to detect text updates:
- **No text yet:** `textUrl` is `None` → check every sync
- **Has text, not final:** `textUrl` set, `textVersionType` ≠ `"ENR"` → re-check if `updateDateIncludingText` changed
- **Has enrolled text:** `textVersionType` = `"ENR"` → final, no further checks
`textVersionType` stores version code (e.g., `"IH"`, `"ENR"`), matching `TextVersionCode` enum. On new text detection, `bill.text.available` event triggers bill-analysis-pipeline re-analysis.

## New Classes

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `BillCosponsorDO` | `bill_cosponsors` | billId, memberId, isOriginalCosponsor, sponsorshipDate |
| `BillSubjectDO` | `bill_subjects` | billId, subjectName, embedding (vector), updateDate |
| `MemberDO` | `members` | memberId, firstName, lastName, directOrderName, invertedOrderName, honorificName, birthYear, currentParty, state, district, imageUrl, imageAttribution, officialUrl, updateDate, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `MemberTermDO` | `member_terms` | termId (UUID), memberId, chamber, congress, startYear, endYear, memberType, stateCode, stateName, district |
| `MemberPartyHistoryDO` | `member_party_history` | partyHistoryId (UUID), memberId, partyName, partyAbbreviation, startYear |
| `VoteDO` | `votes` | voteId, congress, chamber, rollNumber, sessionNumber, billId, question, voteType, voteMethod, result, voteDate, legislationNumber, legislationType, legislationUrl, sourceDataUrl, updateDate, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `VotePositionDO` | `vote_positions` | voteId, memberId, position, partyAtVote, stateAtVote, createdAt |
| `VoteHistoryDO` | `vote_history` | historyId (UUID), voteId, congress, chamber, rollNumber, sessionNumber, billId, question, voteType, voteMethod, result, voteDate, legislationNumber, legislationType, legislationUrl, sourceDataUrl, updateDate, archivedAt |
| `VoteHistoryPositionDO` | `vote_history_positions` | historyId, memberId, position, partyAtVote, stateAtVote |
| `AmendmentDO` | `amendments` | amendmentId, congress, amendmentType, number, billId, chamber, description, purpose, sponsorBioguideId, submittedDate, latestActionDate, latestActionText, updateDate, apiUrl, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `MemberHistoryDO` | `member_history` | historyId (UUID), memberId, firstName, lastName, directOrderName, invertedOrderName, honorificName, birthYear, currentParty, state, district, imageUrl, imageAttribution, officialUrl, updateDate, archivedAt |
| `MemberTermHistoryDO` | `member_term_history` | historyId (UUID, FK → member_history), memberId, chamber, congress, startYear, endYear, memberType, stateCode, stateName, district |
| `LisMemberMappingDO` | `lis_member_mapping` | lisMemberId (PK, e.g., "S428"), memberId (FK → members.member_id / bioguideId), lastVerified |

## Conversion Methods (`toDO`)

| DTO | Produces | Notes |
|-----|----------|-------|
| `BillListItemDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, BillDO]` | Partial BillDO (list-level fields only, detail fields null/None) |
| `BillDetailDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, BillConversionResult]` | Contains: `BillDO` + `List[BillCosponsorDO]` + `List[BillSubjectDO]` |
| `MemberDetailDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, MemberConversionResult]` | Contains: `MemberDO` + `List[MemberTermDO]` + `List[MemberPartyHistoryDO]` |
| `VoteMembersDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, VoteConversionResult]` | Contains: `VoteDO` + `List[VotePositionDO]`. Works for House (JSON) and Senate (XML after LIS resolution). |
| `SenateVoteXmlDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, VoteMembersDTO]` | Converts Senate XML to unified `VoteMembersDTO`. Requires `Map[String, String]` (lisMemberId → bioguideId). Returns `Left` if any member ID unresolved. |
| `AmendmentDetailDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, AmendmentDO]` | Single DO |

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.2 Legislative DOs

**Functional:**
1. Every DO case class has fields matching every database table column (camelCase names).
2. Every DO has Doobie auto-derived `Read` and `Write` instances (no manual `toPojo`).
3. `BillDO` contains all 27 non-audit columns; `textEmbedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]` for pgvector.
4. `toDO` conversions validate required fields, return `Left` with descriptive message on failure.
5. `BillDetailDTO.toDO` produces `BillConversionResult`: one `BillDO`, zero+ `BillCosponsorDO`, zero+ `BillSubjectDO`.
6. `MemberDetailDTO.toDO` produces `MemberConversionResult`: one `MemberDO`, zero+ `MemberTermDO`, zero+ `MemberPartyHistoryDO`.
7. `VoteMembersDTO.toDO` produces `VoteConversionResult`: one `VoteDO`, one `VotePositionDO` per member. Works identically for House/Senate; chamber in `VoteDO.chamber`.
8. `SenateVoteXmlDTO.toDO` accepts LIS-to-bioguide mapping, produces `VoteMembersDTO`. Returns `Left` listing unresolved `lisMemberId` on failure.
9. `VoteDO.voteId` = `{congress}-{chamber}-{rollNumber}` (natural key).
10. `BillDO.billId` = `{congress}-{billType}-{number}` (natural key).
11. `AmendmentDO.amendmentId` = `{congress}-{amendmentType}-{number}` (natural key).
12. `LisMemberMappingDO` fields: lisMemberId (String), memberId (String, bioguideId), lastVerified (Instant).
13. `MemberHistoryDO` mirrors `MemberDO` + historyId (UUID) + archivedAt (Instant). Archive-before-overwrite pattern.
14. `MemberTermHistoryDO` mirrors `MemberTermDO` + historyId (UUID, FK → member_history). Shares historyId with corresponding `MemberHistoryDO`.

**Error Handling:**
11. `toDO` never throws; all failures return `Left[String]` with field name and reason.
12. Each conversion failure has unique exception class: `BillConversionFailed`, `MemberConversionFailed`, `VoteConversionFailed`, `AmendmentConversionFailed`.

**Test Requirements:**
13. Unit test per `toDO` with fully populated DTO — verify all DO fields mapped correctly.
14. Unit test per `toDO` with each required field missing — verify `Left` with descriptive message.
15. Unit test per `toDO` verifying natural key construction (billId, voteId, amendmentId).
16. `BillDetailDTO.toDO` fans out sponsors into `BillCosponsorDO` list (test empty list).
17. `MemberDetailDTO.toDO` fans out terms and partyHistory correctly.
18. `VoteMembersDTO.toDO` produces one `VotePositionDO` per member result.
19. `SenateVoteXmlDTO.toDO` with complete LIS mapping produces valid `VoteMembersDTO` (chamber = Senate).
20. `SenateVoteXmlDTO.toDO` with missing LIS mapping returns `Left` listing unresolved `lisMemberId`.
21. `LisMemberMappingDO` round-trips through Doobie `Read`/`Write`.
